TextENGNew: And besides: now that they were gone, I was free of every worry that had crushed me.

TextENGNew: If that was the price—then this much… I could bear.
changeReason: Content misalignment: TextENGNew does not translate the Japanese source text; it appears to contain text from a different part of the story.

TextENGNew: …Don't look back. If I stop now, I won't be able to take another step forward.
changeReason: Content misalignment: TextENGNew does not translate the Japanese source text; it appears to contain text from a different part of the story.

TextENGNew: Something tar-black—like crude oil—clings to my whole body, and if I let it, it will stop me from moving, from thinking at all.
changeReason: Content misalignment: TextENGNew does not translate the Japanese source text; it appears to contain text from a different part of the story.

TextENGNew: What I can do right now… is only to keep believing.
changeReason: Content misalignment: TextENGNew does not translate the Japanese source text; it appears to contain text from a different part of the story.

TextENGNew: That what I did in this trash heap—no, what I accomplished—was the only choice left to me.
changeReason: Content misalignment: TextENGNew does not translate the Japanese source text; it appears to contain text from a different part of the story.

TextENGNew: …Ah, come to think of it—long ago, near the end of the dam conflict, a murder case had occurred right here on this site. The site foreman.
changeReason: Content misalignment: TextENGNew does not translate the Japanese source text; it appears to contain text from a different part of the story.

TextENGNew: At first I had thought about sending them down the stream that runs through the dam construction site.
changeReason: Content misalignment: TextENGNew does not translate the Japanese source text; it appears to contain text from a different part of the story.

TextENGNew: But if I did that, someone downstream would certainly find them.
changeReason: Content misalignment: TextENGNew does not translate the Japanese source text; it appears to contain text from a different part of the story.

TextENGNew: I remembered hearing news reports about remains found along a riverbed, washed up somewhere downstream.
changeReason: Content misalignment: TextENGNew does not translate the Japanese source text; it appears to contain text from a different part of the story.

TextENGNew: Going further into the abandoned villages toward Yagauchi or Takatsudo—there are unmapped mountains deep in there.
changeReason: Content misalignment: TextENGNew does not translate the Japanese source text; it appears to contain text from a different part of the story.

TextENGNew: Somewhere in those mountains would be safe.
changeReason: Content misalignment: TextENGNew does not translate the Japanese source text; it appears to contain text from a different part of the story.

TextENGNew: …Don't stop. Keep walking.
changeReason: Content misalignment: TextENGNew does not translate the Japanese source text; it appears to contain text from a different part of the story.

TextENGNew: …Don't look back. Look only ahead.
changeReason: Content misalignment: TextENGNew does not translate the Japanese source text; it appears to contain text from a different part of the story.

TextENGNew: …My body aches in unfamiliar places—muscles I've never used before.
changeReason: Content misalignment: TextENGNew does not translate the Japanese source text; it appears to contain text from a different part of the story.

TextENGNew: I finished the cleanup carefully, then went into my hideout and lay down on the mattress.
changeReason: Content misalignment: TextENGNew does not translate the Japanese source text; it appears to contain text from a different part of the story.

TextENGNew: …Damp sweat had matted my bangs to my forehead—uncomfortable.
changeReason: Content misalignment: TextENGNew does not translate the Japanese source text; it appears to contain text from a different part of the story.

TextENGNew: I'll take a bath later. Take my time and wash every inch of myself.
changeReason: Content misalignment: TextENGNew does not translate the Japanese source text; it appears to contain text from a different part of the story.

TextENGNew: I stared at the rusted roof of my hideout—the abandoned car—and breathed slowly.
changeReason: Content misalignment: TextENGNew does not translate the Japanese source text; it appears to contain text from a different part of the story.

TextENGNew: I could hear the higurashi.
changeReason: Content misalignment: TextENGNew does not translate the Japanese source text; it appears to contain text from a different part of the story.
